notes: MegaBugs reliability fix. Tickets created via the API/automation that were missing schema fields — a message's images/timestamp/is_admin, or a partial system_info block — could no longer be opened ("Ticket parse error: missing field `images`"), and quick-closing one made it reappear instantly because the close path hit the same parse. The ticket deserialiser now tolerates those omissions and self-heals affected tickets on the next save; six existing in-progress tickets were repaired. Ticket 20260623-005327-31743efa.
